mapper.sql: id, document_id, user_id, category_id, title, filename, author, abstract, file_path, file_size, file_size_display, pages, status, tags, read_progress, upload_date, processed_at, created_at, updated_at
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO documents ( document_id, user_id, category_id, title, filename, author, abstract, file_path, file_size, file_size_display, pages, status, tags, read_progress, upload_date, processed_at, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES
( #{item.documentId}, #{item.userId}, #{item.categoryId}, #{item.title}, #{item.filename}, #{item.author}, #{item.abstractText}, #{item.file_path}, #{item.fileSize}, #{item.fileSizeDisplay}, #{item.pages}, #{item.status}, #{item.tags,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=com.zd.scliteraturemanage.config.PostgreSQLJsonbTypeHandler}, #{item.readProgress}, #{item.uploadDate}, #{item.processedAt}, #{item.createdAt}, #{item.updatedAt} )
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM documents WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY upload_date DESC

SELECT
FROM documents WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY upload_date DESC

SELECT
FROM documents WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY upload_date DESC

SELECT
FROM documents WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY upload_date DESC

SELECT
FROM documents
user_id = #{userId}
AND ( title ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR author ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR abstract ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') )
ORDER BY upload_date DESC
